title: narcissus jonquilla var. gaditanus
intro: Narcissus jonquilla var. gaditanus, also known as the Cadiz Jonquil, is a variety of the Daffodil plant, characterized by its sweetly scented, small yellow flowers that bloom in clusters. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Narcissus jonquilla var. gaditanus include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and its ability to support digestive health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
